TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_calamay, title = calamay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/calamay} }

S.FORM: == satangahan : == calamay paysananal kibetul ku calamay i zazan nu Kuhkuh. u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :ťúß,ŚĻ≥Śúįťúß calamay sa, i enalay a uul atu lesing. tinaku a kamu sicalamay 1.ŤĶ∑ťúß anu sicalamay ku zazan sa la'cus ku paculil tu kazizeng.
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan : == ¶ar~…ĺamaj pajsananar~…ĺ kib…ôtur~…ĺ ku ¶ar~…ĺamaj i zazan nu kuńßkuńß. u zuma a kamu : nu ńßur~…ĺam :*,*** ¶ar~…ĺamaj sa, i …ônar~…ĺaj a uur~…ĺ atu r~…ĺ…ôsiŇč. tinaku a kamu si ¶ar~…ĺamaj *.** anu si ¶ar~…ĺamaj ku zazan sa r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us ku pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu kaziz…ôŇč.
S.FORM: == satangahan : == calamay paysananal kibetul ku calamay i zazan nu Kuhkuh. u zuma a kamu : nu Hulam :ťúß,ŚĻ≥Śúįťúß calamay sa, i enalay a uul atu lesing. tinaku a kamu sicalamay 1.ŤĶ∑ťúß anu sicalamay ku zazan sa la'cus ku paculil tu kazizeng.
S.PHON: == sataŇčańßan : == ¶ar~…ĺamaj pajsananar~…ĺ kib…ôtur~…ĺ ku ¶ar~…ĺamaj i zazan nu kuńßkuńß. u zuma a kamu : nu ńßur~…ĺam :*,*** ¶ar~…ĺamaj sa, i …ônar~…ĺaj a uur~…ĺ atu r~…ĺ…ôsiŇč. tinaku a kamu si ¶ar~…ĺamaj *.** anu si ¶ar~…ĺamaj ku zazan sa r~…ĺa Ē~ ° ¶us ku pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺ tu kaziz…ôŇč.
